ShortDescription.Value: Auto-Clean garbage OR use Trash Boss = Self manage trucks + facilities

Publish.LongDescription:
**Magic Garbage + Trash Boss**
### OPTION 1 SELF MANAGE - Adjust garbage truck capacities - Adjust facility processing speed - Change total Garbage trucks. - 🚚 Great for players who still want normal game vanilla garbage service and trucks driving around; now with fewer problems.
### Priority Assist - Truck priority dispatch so that buildings with higher garbage don't get ignored. - Prioritizes buildings > 7t garbage.
### OPTION 2 AUTO CLEAN - Removes all garbage automatically. - Garbage warning icons cleared. - Mod does not stop Garbage system; cleanup is just very fast.
**11+ Languages supported** - Hello, Bonjour, Hallo, Hola, Ciao, 안녕하세요, こんにちは, Olá, Cześć, 你好, 你好, Xin chào
### Optional Power User - Allows advanced tuning and experimentation. - Most cities work well just using Trash Boss + Priority Assist. - Let the city run about 1 in-game month before judging results. - Tweak Power User controls if the standard Trash controls are not enough.
#### Support and feedback - If the mod helps you, give it a Like, it's free + easy :) - Feedback on: Github, Discord, links on the right of this page.
---
### Compatibility - Safe to remove any time. - Does not use Harmony patch; designed to be lightweight for the best performance.
--- ### Bonus status report - Real stats help show what is happening. - Lean: status does not run in-city per frame; runs in Options menu for best performance to not affect gameplay. - Detailed log button writes even more detailed notes in the Log file for reference.
### Credits - RiverMochi - author - Thanks to Wayz for inspiration on the original Magical Garbage mod - yenyang - code review, tech advice - Necko1996 - testing, screenshots - gagaxm - truck image
Publish.ChangeLog: - Increased garbage truck capacity to 1000% - Added Vietnamese translation. - Internal cleanup.
